name: Fakrul Islam Tushar, PhD
title: Assistant Professor, Department of Medical Imaging
bio: Dr. Tushar is a computational medical imaging researcher with expertise in virtual imaging trials, AI-driven image analysis, and synthetic data generation. He earned his PhD from Duke University, where he worked at the Center for Virtual Imaging Trials (CVIT) developing simulation-based evaluation frameworks and deep learning methods for lung cancer screening. His research is driven by the goal of making medical AI more rigorous, reproducible, and clinically grounded.
